name: Gwen

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: A Thousand Cuts
passive.description_source: Innate:  Gwen's  basic attacks  on-hit and damaging abilities deal bonus magic damage equal to a portion of the target's maximum health and  heal her for a portion of this damage dealt against  champions.

effects.description: Innate: Gwen's basic attacks on-hit, the center of Snip Snip!, and Needlework deal bonus magic damage equal to 1% (+ 0.6% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health.

A Thousand Cuts is modified based on the target:
 Heals Gwen for 50% of post-mitigation damage dealt against champions, capped at 10 : 26.76 (based on level) (+ 6.5% AP) per instance.
Deals an additional 8 : 32.59 (based on level) bonus magic damage against minions that are below 40% health.
Deals a maximum of 3 (+ 5% AP) magic damage against monsters.

passive.description: Innate: Gwen's basic attacks on-hit, the center of Snip Snip!, and Needlework deal bonus magic damage equal to 1% (+ 0.6% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The attacks do not deal the bonus damage against structures.

basic_ability_1.name: Snip Snip!
basic_ability_1.description_source: Passive:  Gwen's  basic attacks  on-hit generate  stacks of Snippy, up to a cap.

effects.description: Passive: Gwen's basic attacks generate a stack of Snippy on-hit for 6 seconds, stacking up to 4 times and refreshing on subsequent attacks.

effects.context_notes: Active: Gwen snips at least twice with her scissors in a cone in the target direction over the cast time, dealing magic damage per snip to all enemies within the area, with the final snip dealing increased damage.

Active: Gwen snips at least twice with her scissors in a cone in the target direction over the cast time, dealing magic damage per snip to all enemies within the area, with the final snip dealing increased damage.

Active: Gwen snips at least twice with her scissors in a cone in the target direction over the cast time, dealing magic damage per snip to all enemies within the area, with the final snip dealing increased damage.

Active: Gwen snips at least twice with her scissors in a cone in the target direction over the cast time, dealing magic damage per snip to all enemies within the area, with the final snip dealing increased damage.
If Gwen has any Snippy stacks, she consumes them to snip an additional time for each.

basic_ability_1.description: Passive: Gwen's basic attacks generate a stack of Snippy on-hit for 6 seconds, stacking up to 4 times and refreshing on subsequent attacks.

basic_ability_2.name: Hallowed Mist
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Gwen summons the Hallowed Mist upon her current location for a few seconds. Hallowed Mist can be recast within this time, and does so automatically if she attempts to leave the area.

effects.description: Active: Gwen summons the Hallowed Mist upon her current location, lasting for 4 seconds. Hallowed Mist can be recast after 0.5 seconds, and does so automatically if Gwen attempts to leave the area.

effects.context_notes: While inside the mist, Gwen becomes ghosted, gains bonus armor and bonus magic resistance and is untargetable to all enemies (except turrets and monsters) outside of the mist.

effects.description: Recast: Gwen commands the mist to move to her current location.
Gwen negates all attacks by monsters outside of the mist.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Gwen summons the Hallowed Mist upon her current location, lasting for 4 seconds. Hallowed Mist can be recast after 0.5 seconds, and does so automatically if Gwen attempts to leave the area.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Hallowed Mist's untargetability does not apply to monsters nor turrets, meaning they are allowed to gain aggro against Gwen and attack her regardless of being in the mist or not.

basic_ability_3.name: Skip 'n Slash
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Gwen  dashes to the target location, and afterwards empowers her  basic attacks for a duration, gaining  bonus attack speed, magic damage, and  range.

effects.context_notes: Active: Gwen dashes to the target location, then empowers her basic attacks within the next 4 seconds to deal 15 (+ 20% AP) bonus magic damage on-hit and gain bonus attack speed and 75 bonus attack range.
Gwen's first basic attack within the duration refunds a percentage of Skip 'n Slash's cooldown.

effects.description: Skip 'n Slash resets Gwen's basic attack timer, and can be cast during any of her abilities, and vice versa.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Gwen dashes to the target location, then empowers her basic attacks within the next 4 seconds to deal 15 (+ 20% AP) bonus magic damage on-hit and gain bonus attack speed and 75 bonus attack range.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Skip 'n Slash has no minimum dash range.
Manual review (2026-02-25): Skip 'n Slash resolves in two phases: dash/reposition on cast, then empowered basic-attack state over the 4-second window with first-hit cooldown refund branch.

ultimate.name: Needlework
ultimate.description_source: First Cast:  Gwen launches a needle in the target direction that deals magic damage and  slows enemies hit. Needlework can be recast up to two more times.

effects.context_notes: Active: Gwen launches a needle that deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds, with additional recast waves.
Active: Gwen launches a needle that deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds, with additional recast waves.
Active: Gwen launches a needle that deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds, with additional recast waves.
Needlework can be recast twice more within 8 seconds of the activation at no additional cost, with a 1-second static cooldown between casts.
Recast: Gwen mimics the first cast's effects, while barraging three needles on the second cast and five on the third cast.
Recast: Gwen mimics the first cast's effects, while barraging three needles on the second cast and five on the third cast.
Recast: Gwen mimics the first cast's effects, while barraging three needles on the second cast and five on the third cast.

effects.description: Gwen can move during Needlework's cast times.

ultimate.description: Active: Gwen launches a needle in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them for 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Dying during the cast time will prevent the remaining needles of the cast from being launched.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior re-verification for Skip 'n Slash dash timing, empowered basic-attack window semantics, and first-hit cooldown-refund branch

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
